flags.justification: This revokes sanctions authority; it does not create new concentrated power.
Clear, specific revocation with defined provisions preserving enforcement continuity for pre-revocation violations.
Single coherent purpose: revoking Rhodesian sanctions in connection with Zimbabwe's independence transition.
Removes rather than creates a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time revocation grants no ongoing authority requiring reauthorization.
A substantive sanctions-lifting policy change, not a removal of any review or oversight mechanism.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A well-crafted sanctions-transition order with careful savings clauses preserving liability for pre-revocation violations.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
